title: Bootstrap repo contracts and metadata store
description:
GitHub issue #2 parent task.

validation_contract:
  required_checks:
    - python package skeleton exists
    - contract models exist
    - sqlite metadata store exists
  automated_tests_required: true
  manual_evidence_required:
    - README setup path reviewed
  blocked_by_missing_harness: false

title: E1 Create Python project skeleton and package layout
description:
Maps to R3,R5.

validation_contract:
  required_checks:
    - project files added
    - import path resolves
  automated_tests_required: false
  manual_evidence_required:
    - tree review
  blocked_by_missing_harness: false

title: E2 Define metadata contract models
description:
Maps to R1.

validation_contract:
  required_checks:
    - valid payload accepted
    - invalid payload rejected
  automated_tests_required: true
  manual_evidence_required: []
  blocked_by_missing_harness: false

title: E3 Create SQLite schema and metadata access layer
description:
Maps to R2.

validation_contract:
  required_checks:
    - schema created
    - round-trip persistence works
  automated_tests_required: true
  manual_evidence_required: []
  blocked_by_missing_harness: false

title: E4 Add config and local setup documentation
description:
Maps to R5.

validation_contract:
  required_checks:
    - README setup updated
  automated_tests_required: false
  manual_evidence_required:
    - README reviewed against actual commands
  blocked_by_missing_harness: false

title: E5 Add automated tests for contracts and metadata persistence
description:
Maps to R4.

validation_contract:
  required_checks:
    - contract tests pass
    - persistence tests pass
  automated_tests_required: true
  manual_evidence_required: []
  blocked_by_missing_harness: false
